Secure Your Account with Two-Factor Auth: Secure Your Account with Two-Factor Authentication
Follow these simple steps to enable extr: Follow these simple steps to enable extra protection for your login.
Download the Google Authenticator app fr: Download the Google Authenticator app from the following links on your mobile device:
icon to add a new account.
Read the Qr code that appears on the pre: Read the Qr code that appears on the previous page.
After scanning, a 6-digit code will appe: After scanning, a 6-digit code will appear in the app. Enter this code on the login page to verify.
Your account is now protected with two-f: Your account is now protected with two-factor authentication. You’ll need the code each time you log in.
Google Authenticator provides an additio: Google Authenticator provides an additional layer of security by generating time-based one-time passwords (TOTP) on your mobile device. This ensures that even if someone knows your password, they can't access your account without the unique verification code generated by the app.
